DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 7D/CTS 7/WS/VF2 150/RESTR/CTORD THE DEFENDNT TO NOT POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS/ /PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/CCC:COUNTS 4 & 5/

/CAL PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWSTAY 11-17-20/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNTS 4 & 5, MISDEMEANOR CHARGES OF 484(A)PC AND 594B(2)APC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:COUNTS 4 & 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/
